# Fix empty state rendering in TerminalPanel

When there is no terminal output, the panel renders poorly (blank spacing / inconsistent borders).

## Task
- Locate `TerminalPanel` component.
- Handle empty output state with proper UI and accessibility.

## Acceptance criteria
- No visual glitches when output is empty.
- Added/updated tests if the component has tests; otherwise manual verification notes.
